title: Operator Skill Template
desc: Template for skills that help operators inspect, verify, audit, dry-run, and safely execute existing systems without changing implementation details.
steps: Classify the skill as operator-facing before writing anything else.
State the observable task in one sentence: inspect, find, verify, audit, dry-run, review, or execute safely.
Keep the steps short, shell-safe, and reproducible; output contracts should come before action flow.
Prefer minimal orthogonal options such as verify, audit, dry-run, review, inspect, list, export, import, or install.
If the skill changes state, include one explicit verification step that confirms the result.
If the skill targets windows or UI, state the discovery flow first and the action flow second.
Do not include developer-only implementation details unless the operator must know them to avoid failure.
author: claude
